description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal boots with a square toe design from lee cooper add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Leather upper for added durability and style Square toe design for a more stylish look Elastic gores on either side of the mid-foot for a more versatile Fit Zipped at the side for easy on-off wear Leather haul loop for ease of wear and to hang shoes from a backpack Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Leather inner lining for keeping the feet dry, offering all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with a wooden finish and a design on the fore-foot Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
